name: Darkness

components.material: bat fur and a piece of coal

description: For the duration, magical Darkness spreads from a point within range and fills a 15-foot-radius Sphere. Darkvision can't see through it, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it. Engine treatment: each creature in the sphere at cast time gains the Heavily Obscured condition (identical to Fog Cloud). Concentration ends → condition stripped. The 'dispels other light spells of L2 or lower' rule is descriptive only.
